name: Microwave Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 Bacon strips, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a covered 2 quart microwave-safe dish on high for 4-5 minutes or until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Drain the clam juice into the drippings. Stir in potatoes and onion. Cover and cook on high for 8-10 minutes or until potatoes are tender, stirring once or twice.
3. Stir flour into 1/4 cup of milk; add to potato mixture. Stir in salt, pepper and remaining milk. Cover and cook on medium for 6 minutes, stirring once or twice.
4. Let stand for 3-5 minutes. Stir in clams and butter. Garnish with bacon and parsley.
